privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated PEBL BCST data. I verified that setup_task.sh generates exactly 30 valid participant files across three sites (site_a, site_b, site_c) with 64 trials each, plus one incomplete participant (sub-A11) and one corrupted HTML file (sub-B11_bcst.csv) for a total of 32 files and 1920 expected valid rows. I also discovered a critical defect: task.json is physically truncated at the end of the description field, causing it to be invalid JSON and completely missing its metadata field.
